series_metadata.series_description: This records series includes, but not limited to, records developed by, or under contract for, the Ohio Department of Education, in support of the Department's public affairs or public relations activities.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain two (2) years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of, if not transferred. ; Paper: Retain two (2) years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of, if not transferred., Electronic: Archives ; Paper: Archives
